description: The PhotoMetadata component is used to contain the information on a photo usually taken within Resonite. It is automatically attached to every screenshot taken using the finger photo gesture. This component can also be attached to a photo imported with the "import as screenshot" option when importing an image.

fields.LocationName: Name of the session the screenshot was taken in.
fields.LocationURL: The URI of the session's world that the photo was taken in. (basically a world link)
fields.LocationHost: Host of the session the screenshot was taken in.
fields.LocationHiddenFromListing: Whether the location was marked as hidden.
fields.TimeTaken: Exact timestamp that the screenshot was taken.
fields.TakenGlobalPosition: The position in global space the camera had when the photo was taken.
fields.TakenGlobalRotation: The rotation in global space the camera had when the photo was taken.
fields.TakenGlobalScale: The scale in global space the camera had when the photo was taken.
fields.AppVersion: Resonite version number of the photographer.
fields.CameraFOV: FOV of the camera at picture time.
fields.Is360: Whether the image is a 360 degree image or not.
fields.StereoLayout: The layout of the image's left and right sections if it is a stereoscopic image, also known as a 3D image.
fields._exportedUsers: This is a list of users that exported the screenshot. If this component is part of a saved item, this is the list of users that exported the screenshot before the item was saved to the cloud.

methods.OnSavePhoto: Called when the save photo button is touched.
methods.OnExportPhoto: Called when the export photo button is touched.
